tagline: Where public nudity meets drunken absurdity
rules:
Virtual Vixens VRChat Rules: Comprehensive Chaos
Alright, listen up, you beautiful freaks! Holy hell. We're a group built on public nudity and drunken absurdity, but to keep the chaos fun and not a total dumpster fire, follow these basics:

Don't be a total dipshit. Seriously, don't ruin the vibe. Be cool, I guess.

Consent is King. If someone is clearly not into it, you back off immediately. Simple as that. No means no.

No Recording/Streaming. Do not record, stream, or share content of other users without their express consent. That's just shady.

No hate speech. Keep the absurd language focused on jokes, not on being aggressive or harmful. We want laughs, not drama.

Keep the political or religious talk out. Holy hell, just don't.

No illegal or otherwise suspicious content. Don't be a goober.

Don't drop personal information. That's just weird and unsafe.

Keep the self-promotion out of here. No one cares about your channel.

Keep your name appropriate. Don't be a weirdo.

Staff Contact & Reports. Do not seek out the Vixens for petty issues or direct message the staff. If there is a serious problem, Block the person first, then report it to the Discord server in the #reports-and-support channel. Handle small issues yourself. We're busy.

DISCLAIMER: If you join this group/this event, you may or may not encounter provocative activities or content, and if you join this group/event, you indicate consent to view these activities or content.

A Note on Rules:
Rules are subject to common sense. If you have to ask, the answer is probably no. Now go get weird.
infoBoard:
Alright‚ listen up‚ you degeneratesǃ You've stumbled upon the Virtual Vixens‚ and let me tell ya‚ we're not here for your grandma's tea party․ If you're looking for a group that embraces the glorious chaos of public nudity and drunken absurdity‚ you've found your new digital home․

Think of us as the love child of a drinking group and a lewd group‚ but with absolutely no filter․ We're free‚ we're open‚ and we're probably already three shots deep․ So if you're ready to shed your inhibitions （and maybe your clothes） and dive headfirst into some virtual debauchery‚ come on in․ Just don't say I didn't warn you․ This ain't for the faint of heart‚ but it's gonna be one hell of a ride․
